description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2022 BMW X5 xDrive 40i, 3.0L TC I6, AWD, 340 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 209,000 or AED 3,274 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 57,456 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until July 2026 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Valid Until July 2026 or 100,000 KMs - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Comfort Access System - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - Cup Holder Temperature Adjustable - 360 Surround View Camera - Comfort Seats, Electric Adjustable - Travel & Comfort System - Automatic Air Conditioning 4-zone Control - Ambient Lighting - Automatic High-beam Headlights Control - Driving Assistant Professional - Parking Assistant Plus - Harman/Kardon Surround Sound System - Apple CarPlay - Wireless Charging - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - BMW Gesture Control - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Aerodynamics Package
